title: Functions
description: Defining and calling functions, optional parameters.

slides.title: Functions in Dart 📞

quizData.question: Which function parameter type is enclosed in `{}`?
quizData.explanation: Named parameters are enclosed in curly braces `{}` and can be optional or required with `required` keyword.

slides.title: See it in Action
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use arrow functions for short logic

If a function body is a single expression, use `=>` for conciseness, like `int square(int x) => x * x;`
